creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 191917
patch file

Update to new upstream releases.

Because they include security fixes of following vulnerabilities, patch should be merged to quarterly branch.

* CVE-2018-6914
* CVE-2018-8779
* CVE-2018-8780
* CVE-2018-8777
* CVE-2017-17742
* CVE-2018-8778

And bug #227053 documents above vulnerabilities in security/vuxml. So please commit it too.
